title: crotalaria eriocarpa
intro: Crotalaria eriocarpa, also known as the "Prairie Rattlebox," is a flowering plant species in the legume family that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the immune system and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The health benefits of Crotalaria eriocarpa include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory issues. Crotalaria eriocarpa can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and its leaves and flowers are sometimes used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being.
